description_long: This modern bungalow features a sleek, boxy design with a flat roof and a minimalist aesthetic. The exterior alternates between stark white and deep black facades, with large floor-to-ceiling windows on the poolside, allowing for ample natural light. A spacious wooden deck surrounds a rectangular swimming pool, complemented by outdoor lounge furniture and shaded by tall palm trees. The property includes a driveway with a parked car and is bordered by a paved sidewalk and landscaped trees. The rear and side elevations are more private, with smaller, rectangular windows and clean, uninterrupted wall surfaces. The overall layout emphasizes open outdoor living spaces and a strong connection between the interior and exterior environments.
description: A modern, flat-roofed bungalow with black and white facades, large windows, a wooden deck, and a pool surrounded by palm trees and landscaping.
description_view_0: View 0 shows the bungalow from an angle highlighting the pool, wooden deck, palm trees, and the driveway with a car.
description_view_1: View 1 presents the rear of the bungalow, emphasizing the white facade, smaller windows, and the driveway with the car.
description_view_2: View 2 displays the side of the bungalow, focusing on the pool area, deck, and the arrangement of trees around the property.
description_view_3: View 3 offers a direct look at the front facade with large windows, the pool, outdoor furniture, and lush landscaping.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large front-facing windows and smaller side and rear windows
